name: Election of Taxable Year Other Than Required Year

eligibility.description: Partnerships, S-Corps, and PSCs not part of a tiered structure; requires making 'required payments' under Section 7519 for partnerships/S-Corps or meeting deduction limits under 280H for PSCs.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Partnerships, S corporations, and personal service corporations can elect a taxable year other than the required calendar year, allowing for a deferral period of up to 3 months.
